excluded.AcceptTOSNotice: Not wrapped yet; newsletter/legal flow omitted from current API.
excluded.AddEventHandler: Internal client wiring only; events are exposed as JSON IPC events.
excluded.AddEventHandlerWithSuccessStatus: Internal client wiring only; events are exposed as JSON IPC events.
excluded.BuildHistorySyncRequest: Low-level sync helper not exposed yet.
excluded.ConnectContext: Context-specific variant; connect uses shared app context.
excluded.DangerousInternals: Explicitly unsafe/internal API not exposed over IPC.
excluded.DownloadAny: Alternative media helper not exposed yet.
excluded.DownloadFB: Facebook media helper not exposed yet.
excluded.DownloadFBToFile: Facebook media helper not exposed yet.
excluded.DownloadHistorySync: Low-level sync helper not exposed yet.
excluded.DownloadMediaWithPath: Alternative media helper not exposed yet.
excluded.DownloadMediaWithPathToFile: Alternative media helper not exposed yet.
excluded.DownloadThumbnail: Alternative media helper not exposed yet.
excluded.DownloadToFile: Alternative media helper not exposed yet.
excluded.FetchAppState: App-state sync APIs not exposed yet.
excluded.GetNewsletterMessageUpdates: Live update polling API not exposed yet.
excluded.GetServerPushNotificationConfig: Push config API not exposed yet.
excluded.GetStatusPrivacy: Status privacy API not exposed yet.
excluded.RegisterForPushNotifications: Push registration API not exposed yet.
excluded.RemoveEventHandler: Internal event-handler management not exposed over IPC.
excluded.RemoveEventHandlers: Internal event-handler management not exposed over IPC.
excluded.SendAppState: App-state sync APIs not exposed yet.
excluded.SendFBMessage: Facebook bridge API not exposed yet.
excluded.SendMediaRetryReceipt: Low-level receipt API not exposed yet.
excluded.SendPeerMessage: Peer message API not exposed yet.
excluded.SetMediaHTTPClient: Custom HTTP client APIs are intentionally not exposed.
excluded.SetPreLoginHTTPClient: Custom HTTP client APIs are intentionally not exposed.
excluded.SetProxy: Network/proxy configuration APIs are intentionally not exposed.
excluded.SetProxyAddress: Network/proxy configuration APIs are intentionally not exposed.
excluded.SetSOCKSProxy: Network/proxy configuration APIs are intentionally not exposed.
excluded.SetWebsocketHTTPClient: Custom HTTP client APIs are intentionally not exposed.
excluded.StoreLIDPNMapping: Store/internal mapping API not exposed over IPC.
excluded.TryFetchPrivacySettings: Direct fetch variant not exposed; getPrivacySettings/setPrivacySetting are exposed.
excluded.Upload: Upload API is exposed via streaming UploadReader command for lower memory usage.
excluded.UploadNewsletter: Newsletter-specific upload API not exposed yet.
excluded.UploadNewsletterReader: Newsletter-specific upload API not exposed yet.

policy.goal: All exported whatsmeow.Client methods must be either wrapped or explicitly excluded with rationale.
notes: Entries in intentional_exclusions are not part of the parity burn-down target.
All other excluded methods are planned wrappers and should be moved to wrapped over time.
